CREATE TABLE time_data (timestamp_a TIME, timestamp_b TIME);
SELECT datesub('hour', timestamp_a, timestamp_b) FROM time_data;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (start_time TIME, end_time TIME);
INSERT INTO additional_data VALUES (TIME '01:30:00', TIME '03:30:00'), (TIME '02:45:00', TIME '05:00:00');
SELECT datesub('minute', a.start_time, b.end_time) FROM additional_data a JOIN time_data b ON a.start_time < b.timestamp_a;
SELECT datesub('minute', TIME '10:00:00', TIME '10:59:59') AS minutes_difference;
SELECT datesub('minute', TIME '01:00:00', TIME '02:00:00') + datesub('minute', TIME '03:00:00', TIME '04:05:00') AS total_difference;
WITH time_comparison AS (SELECT datesub('hour', TIME '01:00:00', TIME '06:00:00') AS hour_diff) SELECT hour_diff * 60 FROM time_comparison;
SELECT DISTINCT datesub('hour', t1.timestamp_a, t2.end_time) FROM time_data t1 JOIN additional_data t2 ON t1.timestamp_b > t2.start_time;
SELECT datesub('hour', TIME '23:00:00', TIME '01:00:00') AS overnight_difference;
